1. Backend starts successfully on port 5000
2. Health check endpoint returns 200
3. GET /api/items returns valid JSON

6. Frontend files are accessible

## Target Command
After implementation, run: `bash /tmp/test-python-webserver/test_integration.sh`

## Output Contract
VERDICT: COMPLETE | BLOCKED | FAILED

## Instructions
1. Read and understand the goal and acceptance criteria
2. Implement the required changes by CALLING THE TOOLS directly - do NOT just describe what you would do
   - Use write_to_file to create or modify files
   - Use execute_command to run shell commands
   - Use read_file to read existing files
   - Do NOT use markdown code blocks - actually call the tools
3. Test your implementation using execute_command: bash /tmp/test-python-webserver/test_integration.sh
4. After completing the work, respond with EXACTLY one of these verdicts:
   - VERDICT: COMPLETE (if all acceptance criteria are met)
   - VERDICT: BLOCKED (if you cannot proceed due to missing dependencies)
   - VERDICT: FAILED (if you encountered unresolvable errors)

CRITICAL: You must CALL the tools, not describe them. Your response should invoke tool calls, wait for results, then provide the verdict.

Begin implementation now.

content.text: Good, the project structure exists. Let me read all the existing files.

# Python Web Server

A simple Python web server using Flask.

## Setup

1. Create and activate the virtual environment:

```bash
cd backend
python3 -m venv venv
source venv/bin/activate
```

2. Install dependencies:

```bash
pip install -r requirements.txt
```

3. Run the server:

```bash
python app.py
```

The server will start on `http://127.0.0.1:5000` by default.

# Python Web Server Backend

## Setup

1. Create virtual environment:
   ```bash
   python3 -m venv venv
   ```

2. Activate virtual environment:
   ```bash
   source venv/bin/activate
   ```

3. Install dependencies:
   ```bash
   pip install -r requirements.txt
   ```

4. Run the server:
   ```bash
   python app.py
   ```

## Dependencies

- Flask 3.1.0
- flask-cors 5.0.1

Flask==3.1.0
flask-cors==5.0.1

Items Manager

Add New Item

Items

Loading items...

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -uo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)"
BACKEND_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/backend"
FRONTEND_DIR="$SCRIPT_DIR/frontend"
VENV_PYTHON="$BACKEND_DIR/venv/bin/python"
VENV_FLASK="$BACKEND_DIR/venv/bin/flask"
SERVER_PID=""
PASS_COUNT=0
FAIL_COUNT=0

cleanup() {
    if [ -n "$SERVER_PID" ] && kill -0 "$SERVER_PID" 2>/dev/null; then
        kill "$SERVER_PID" 2>/dev/null || true
        wait "$SERVER_PID" 2>/dev/null || true
    fi
}
trap cleanup EXIT

pass() {
    echo "  [PASS] $1"
    PASS_COUNT=$((PASS_COUNT + 1))
}

fail() {
    echo "  [FAIL] $1"
    FAIL_COUNT=$((FAIL_COUNT + 1))
}

# --- Start server ---
echo "=== Test: Starting backend server ==="
cd "$BACKEND_DIR"
$VENV_FLASK run --port 5000 &
SERVER_PID=$!
sleep 2

if kill -0 "$SERVER_PID" 2>/dev/null; then
    pass "Backend starts successfully on port 5000"
else
    fail "Backend starts successfully on port 5000"
fi

# --- Health check ---
echo "=== Test: Health check ==="
HEALTH_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/health)
if [ "$HEALTH_STATUS" = "200" ]; then
    pass "Health check endpoint returns 200"
else
    fail "Health check endpoint returns 200 (got $HEALTH_STATUS)"
fi

HEALTH_BODY=$(curl -s http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/health)
if echo "$HEALTH_BODY" | $VENV_PYTHON -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d.get('status')=='healthy'" 2>/dev/null; then
    pass "Health check body contains {\"status\":\"healthy\"}"
else
    fail "Health check body contains {\"status\":\"healthy\"} (got $HEALTH_BODY)"
fi

# --- GET /api/items (empty) ---
echo "=== Test: GET /api/items (empty) ==="
ITEMS_EMPTY=$(curl -s http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/items)
STATUS_EMPTY=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/items)
if [ "$STATUS_EMPTY" = "200" ]; then
    pass "GET /api/items returns 200"
else
    fail "GET /api/items returns 200 (got $STATUS_EMPTY)"
fi

if echo "$ITEMS_EMPTY" | $VENV_PYTHON -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert isinstance(d, list)" 2>/dev/null; then
    pass "GET /api/items returns valid JSON array"
else
    fail "GET /api/items returns valid JSON array"
fi

# --- POST /api/items ---
echo "=== Test: POST /api/items ==="
POST_RESULT=$(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/items \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"name":"Integration Test Item"}')
POST_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/items \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"name":"Integration Test Item"}')

if [ "$POST_STATUS" = "201" ]; then
    pass "POST /api/items returns 201"
else
    fail "POST /api/items returns 201 (got $POST_STATUS)"
fi

if echo "$POST_RESULT" | $VENV_PYTHON -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d.get('name')=='Integration Test Item'; assert 'id' in d" 2>/dev/null; then
    pass "POST /api/items creates item with correct fields"
else
    fail "POST /api/items creates item with correct fields (got $POST_RESULT)"
fi

# --- POST with missing name ---
echo "=== Test: POST /api/items (validation) ==="
VALIDATION_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -X POST http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/items \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{}')
if [ "$VALIDATION_STATUS" = "400" ]; then
    pass "POST /api/items with missing name returns 400"
else
    fail "POST /api/items with missing name returns 400 (got $VALIDATION_STATUS)"
fi

# --- CORS headers ---
echo "=== Test: CORS headers ==="
CORS_HEADER=$(curl -s -D - http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/items 2>&1 | grep -i "access-control-allow-origin" | head -1 | tr -d '\r\n')
if echo "$CORS_HEADER" | grep -qi "access-control-allow-origin: \*"; then
    pass "CORS Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * present in responses"
else
    fail "CORS Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * present in responses (got: $CORS_HEADER)"
fi

# --- Frontend files exist and are non-empty ---
echo "=== Test: Frontend files ==="
FRONTEND_FILES=("index.html" "script.js" "style.css")
ALL_EXIST=true
ALL_NONEMPTY=true
for f in "${FRONTEND_FILES[@]}"; do
    if [ ! -f "$FRONTEND_DIR/$f" ]; then
        ALL_EXIST=false
    fi
    if [ ! -s "$FRONTEND_DIR/$f" ]; then
        ALL_NONEMPTY=false
    fi
done

if $ALL_EXIST; then
    pass "Frontend files exist (index.html, script.js, style.css)"
else
    fail "Frontend files exist (index.html, script.js, style.css)"
fi

if $ALL_NONEMPTY; then
    pass "All frontend files are non-empty"
else
    fail "All frontend files are non-empty"
fi

# --- Cleanup ---
cleanup

# --- Summary ---
echo ""
echo "========================================"
echo "  Integration Test Results"
echo "  Passed: $PASS_COUNT"
echo "  Failed: $FAIL_COUNT"
echo "========================================"

if [ "$FAIL_COUNT" -eq 0 ]; then
    echo ""
    echo "VERDICT: COMPLETE"
    exit 0
else
    echo ""
    echo "VERDICT: FAILED"
    exit 1
fi
